items.name: Candidate dumps an OPTIONSDISPLAY PPM via screen-switch
items.spec: Extend the candidate's SILENCER_DUMP_SCREEN switch to handle 'options_display' and write a 640x480 P6 PPM at /tmp/sdl3_dump/screen_00.ppm. main_menu / options / options_audio pathways must remain unchanged.

items.name: Composition complete (bg + title + 2 toggle rows + Save/Cancel)
items.spec: The dump shows: bank-6 idx-0 fullscreen bg; 'Display Options' title at top; two B220x33 buttons (Fullscreen, Smooth Scaling) at y=50, y=103; off pill (bank 6 idx 12) + on pill (bank 6 idx 15) for each row at literal coords (420, 137+i*53) and (450, 137+i*53); Save and Cancel at y=117. Per docs/design/screen-options-display.md.

items.name: Two-row stride correct (+53 between Fullscreen and Smooth Scaling)
items.spec: Row 1 (Fullscreen) and Row 2 (Smooth Scaling) are exactly 53 px apart vertically, both for the toggle button anchors and for the on/off indicator literal coordinates. Visually matches the reference's row spacing.

items.name: Visual equivalence to /tmp/real_optionsdisplay_dump.ppm
items.spec: Final gate. Candidate PPM is visually equivalent to /tmp/real_optionsdisplay_dump.ppm to a casual reader, modulo aliasing / blend-noise / star-RNG / animation-phase nits (<1% pixel difference acceptable).
